title: Computer services company accesses customer’s laptop remotely during help desk call without seeking customer’s express consent
summary: The complainant claimed that during a help desk service call, a computer services company’s technician accessed his laptop remotely, without his express consent. We found that the respondent was unable to provide evidence to show that it had obtained meaningful express consent to access the complainant’s computer, or customers’ computers...
dedupKey: computer services company accesses customer s laptop remotely during help desk call without seeking customer s express consent|2021-03-24
